caption: A young man with blond hair and glasses is seated in a room, wearing a gray long-sleeved shirt and white over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a microphone and a framed blue poster with the number "20" visible. To his left is a decorated Christmas tree with glowing multicolored lights. A white text banner across the bottom of the scene reads "INSTANTMADDENCOINS.COM - CODE MADD FOR 10% OFF!", with the word "MADD" highlighted in green. As the video progresses, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts from a neutral, open-mouthed look to a smile. His head moves slightly, and his lips change shape as he talks, while the background elements, equipment, and the on-screen promotional text remain static.
